lemmas.primary_translation: prefix for intense heat/cold or as intensifier

definitions.text: førsteledd i ord for sterk hete eller kulde
definitions.translation: first part of words for intense heat or cold

definitions.text: for eksempel i brennhet brennheit og brennkulde
definitions.translation: for example in 'brennhet' (scorching hot) and 'brennkulde' (bitter cold)

definitions.text: brukt forsterkende: svært, veldig, i høy grad
definitions.translation: used as an intensifier: very, extremely, to a high degree

definitions.text: i ord som brennkvikk, brennfort, brennaktuell og brennsikker
definitions.translation: in words like 'brennkvikk' (lightning fast), 'brennfort' (lightning fast), 'brennaktuell' (highly relevant), and 'brennsikker' (absolutely certain)
